title: elaeagnus angustifolia var. spinosa
intro: Elaeagnus angustifolia var. spinosa, also known as Russian olive or silverberry, is a shrub or small tree native to Eurasia and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits include reducing symptoms of digestive disorders, such as constipation and diarrhea, and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. Elaeagnus angustifolia var. spinosa can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
